title.pt: Lendo o corpo de requisições POST
title.es: Leyendo el cuerpo de solicitudes POST
title.it: Leggere il corpo delle richieste POST
title.fr: Lire le corps des requêtes POST

tests: const app = createApp(); const server = app.listen(3050); const res = await fetch('http://localhost:3050/echo', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ message: 'hello' }) }); const json = await res.json(); await new Promise((r) => server.close(r)); expect(json).toEqual({ message: 'hello' });

const app2 = createApp(); const server2 = app2.listen(3051); const res2 = await fetch('http://localhost:3051/echo', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ a: 1, b: 2 }) }); const json2 = await res2.json(); await new Promise((r) => server2.close(r)); expect(json2).toEqual({ a: 1, b: 2 });
